title: Canonical Normalized Campground Record
description: GeoJSON Feature.properties shape produced by every source adapter (USFS, BLM, state parks) before merge. This is the 'USFS-aligned' intermediate schema — the superset of fields any adapter may populate. Fields not applicable to a given source are null/omitted, never fabricated.

source.description: Provenance tag. One per adapter, e.g. usfs_infra, blm_recreation, mt_state_parks, id_state_parks, co_state_parks.

nrrs_id.description: Recreation.gov ID, USFS only. Presence implies reservable.

public_name.description: Display-friendly name, falls back to name.

site_subtype.description: Source-native subtype/category string, upper-cased where the source is USFS (e.g. CAMPGROUND, CAMPING AREA, CAMP UNIT) or the raw BLM Feature Subtype string.

reservation_tier.description: Shared taxonomy across every adapter. See ARCHITECTURE.md for the classification rules per source.

last_update.description: Source-reported last-edited timestamp, format varies by source.

ingest_hash.description: Stable content hash for dedupe/change-detection across runs.

snapshot_date.description: Date this record was generated by the pipeline (ISO 8601 date).

object_id.description: BLM-specific: source-native OBJECTID (BLM's per-record id; parallels site_id for other sources).

feature_subtype.description: BLM-specific: raw Feature Subtype string, e.g. 'Campsite - Developed - Non Reservable - Fee'.

source_dataset.description: State-park adapters only: originating filename, for traceability.

source_record.description: State-park adapters only: full original row, preserved verbatim for maximum fidelity until a dedicated field mapping exists.
